testsuite.system-out:
Now playing "" by Lyrics:
Controls: n=next, p=prev, r=shuffle random song, s=stop Command: Unknown command. Try n (next), p (prev), s (stop). Now playing "P" by gJFS]gh1) Lyrics: P
Controls: n=next, s=stop Command: Unknown command. Try n (next), p (prev), s (stop).
